description_zh: 普拉达（Prada）是意大利最具知识分子气质的奢侈时装品牌，1913年由马里奥·普拉达在米兰创立。品牌最初是一家专营皮具和旅行箱的精品店，以优质皮革和低调奢华的工艺赢得声誉。1978年，马里奥的孙女缪西娅·普拉达接掌品牌，以其独到的艺术视野和极简主义美学推动了一场革命——她于1985年推出的黑色尼龙双肩包以颠覆性的材料运用震惊时尚界，成为品牌里程碑式的作品。普拉达以「丑时髦」（Ugly Chic）美学著称，擅长用不寻常的面料、非传统的色彩和建筑感的剪裁创造出兼具智性与实验性的设计。品牌旗下还拥有Miu Miu、Church's等子品牌，产品涵盖成衣、皮具、鞋履、眼镜和香氛。普拉达在米兰、纽约和上海时装周上始终占据核心地位，是意大利时尚工业中独树一帜的先锋力量。

languages.en: Prada is Italy's most intellectually sophisticated luxury fashion house, founded in 1913 by Mario Prada in Milan. Originally a boutique specializing in leather goods and travel trunks, the brand earned a reputation for high-quality leather and understated craftsmanship. In 1978, Mario's granddaughter Miuccia Prada took over and revolutionized the brand with her artistic vision and minimalist aesthetic — her 1985 black nylon backpack, using unconventional materials, shocked the fashion world and became a milestone piece. Known for the 'Ugly Chic' aesthetic, Prada excels at creating intellectual, experimental designs using unusual fabrics, non-traditional colors, and architectural cuts. The group also owns Miu Miu and Church's, spanning ready-to-wear, leather goods, footwear, eyewear, and fragrances. Prada remains a core presence at fashion weeks in Milan, New York, and Shanghai, standing as a pioneering force in Italian fashion.
